title: EARNINGS SEASON: AMAZON, ROBLOX, & MORE
description:
Amazon invests $200 billion in AI, Roblox pays out $1 billion to creators, and Spotify's ad sales decline. Welcome to another episode of The Media Odyssey Live!

In this live earnings coverage episode, Evan Shapiro and Marion Ranchet break down results from Amazon, Roblox, Sony, and Spotify. The conversation reveals a massive AI spending race across Big Tech, the dramatic shifts happening in gaming away from traditional consoles, and the ongoing struggles of audio advertising. title: Roblox Platform Upgrades Boost Developer Earnings, Performance, and Community Connectivity in Groundbreaking Transformation
description:
# "Everything Roblox Podcast: Platform Updates, Dev Tips & Community Evolution"

Discover the latest Roblox innovations in this comprehensive episode of Everything Roblox with host Matrix. From game-changing platform updates unveiled at the Roblox Developers Conference to professional optimization strategies used by top games like Brookhaven and Pet Simulator X, this episode unpacks everything creators and players need to know about Roblox's evolution.

Learn about the 8.5% increase in Developer

title: ROBLOX CEO David Baszucki Talks Earnings
description:
“Our third-quarter results demonstrate the tremendous progress we’ve made toward our goal of capturing 10% of the global gaming market. Our platform and creator ecosystem are healthier than ever before, driven by broad-based strength, new viral hits, and our strategic investments in creator economics, platform performance, discovery, and the virtual economy,” said David Baszucki, founder and CEO of Roblox. He is joined by Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde.
  
See omnystudio.com/listener fo

title: Tech Earnings Show Heavy AI Spending Continuing
description:
Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss earnings from Alphabet, Microsoft and Meta as Apple and Amazon prepare to report after the bell. Plus, Roblox CEO David Baszucki discusses the platform’s user growth which added to the company’s costs. And President Trump and China's Xi Jinping discussed trade and chips during a meeting in South Korea.
See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

title: Roblox RDC 2025: Creator Earnings Boost, AI Innovation, and Global Community Growth Reshaping Online Gaming
description:
# Everything Roblox Podcast: Latest RDC Updates, UI Design Trends & Community Growth

Explore the game-changing announcements from Roblox Developers Conference 2025 in this week's episode of Everything Roblox. Host Matrix breaks down the increased Developer Exchange rates allowing creators to earn 8.5% more when cashing out Robux, and introduces Roblox Moments—a new feature for sharing gameplay clips. Discover how cutting-edge AI features are revolutionizing gameplay with 4D objects, real-time t

title: Roblox CEO on Shopping, Socializing, and Selling in 3D
description:
On the latest episode of After Earnings, we spoke with Roblox founder and CEO David Baszucki about why gaming is becoming an always-on digital marketplace, how AI is accelerating the work of Roblox creators, and what it’ll take to grow the platform’s share of global gaming spend from 3% to 10%.

title: #284 Schlep - EVERY Parent Needs to Watch This
description:
Schlep, real name Michael, is a 22‑year‑old YouTuber and content creator known for his hard‑hitting investigations exposing child predators on Roblox. Through sting operations and decoy accounts, his channel has uncovered widespread grooming networks using the platform to target minors.

A survivor of Roblox grooming himself—exploited as a young teen by a prominent developer once promoted and partnered with the company. Schlep turned his personal trauma into a mission for accountability. His You

title: An Interview with David Baszucki - The CEO of Roblox
description:
Builderman, also known as David Baszucki, founded Roblox alongside Erik Cassel. In this episode, the CEO responds to some community concerns and reminisces about the early days of the platform.

Chapters

28:12-34:02 Safety

35:15 Outro

title: Steam vs Epic, Nintendo Overpriced, Ubisoft AI, Roblox Predator Debate  Gaming’s Wild Week
description:
Send a text
Valve’s empire is back in the spotlight — Steam Deck drops in price while Nintendo Switch somehow still costs more. We dive into the graveyard of Steam Machines, Controllers, Frames, and the mythical Gabe Cube, then break down Valve’s revenue streams and hardware hustle.

title: How much do you value yourself?
show: The Rundown with Ramon - Ramon Ray - small business podcast for entrepreneurs
description:
On this episode of The Rundown with Ramon, small business expert Ramon Ray unpacks one big theme for entrepreneurs: value. He shares why he turned down a seemingly prestigious global mentorship opportunity, how he closed a major Manulife Canada and Black Enterprise event on a powerful high note, and what HP’s AI-linked layoffs and Roblox’s AI age verification push really mean for your business and career.
You’ll learn how to better own your worth, choose the right opportunities, close events and

description:

title: Roblox CEO reveals plan to boost profits via simulations
description: Charting a path toward domination of the digital universe. Roblox is fresh off a better-than-expected first quarter as it gained traction in new gaming genres such as racing and sports amongst children over the age of 13. Sales, daily active users, and bookings all increased by double-digit percentages. Sales clocked in at $1.03 billion, up 29% from the prior year. Bookings—a measure of in-game currency sales—gained 31% to $1.2 billion. Average daily users improved 26% to 97.8 million. Total hou

title: $70M on TikTok Shop?! The Halo Effect on Amazon Revealed | Jay Hunter
description:
Jay Hunter, CRO at MaryRuth Organics, breaks down how they’ve scaled to over $500M/year in supplements, how their TikTok Shop strategy feeds Amazon sales through halo effects, and why most brands get everything wrong about influencer marketing and channel diversification.  This is a masterclass in real-time execution.  

You'll learn: 
- The $35M Amazon boost from TikTok Shop 
- Why they target complementary, not competitive products 
- How J’s team reaches out to 3,000 creators daily using AI
